text: You swing open the door and open your mouth to expertly parry your oncoming debt only to take a fist to the teeth before you can say anything. You are left reeling over the moral implications of this action and in a daze you take 1 damage. The rude guy at your door says “I’ve had enough of you smooth talkers yappin’ your way out of my fist. Just remember my money in 1 solar cycle or you’ll get more of where that came from.” With a bloody nose you venture into the city
